title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
description: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.

title: ChatGPT skills in beta for ChatGPT Business & Enterprise
description:
We’re introducing Skills in beta for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise.

Skills are reusable, shareable workflows that tell ChatGPT exactly how to do a specific task, enabling ChatGPT to do that task better and more consistently. A skill can bundle instructions, examples, and even code. Once a skill h

title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
description:
Rakuten operates one of the world’s largest digital ecosystems across e-commerce, fintech, and mobile services. Shipping fast without sacrificing reliability is critical.

Teams use OpenAI Codex to support incident response, code review, and development workflows. The agent works inside monitoring s

title: Build Hour: API & Codex
description:
Build agent-powered workflows for real engineering work with Codex and OpenAI APIs. In this Build Hour, you'll learn how teams are moving beyond pair programming to agentic delegation, where AI systems can take on entire engineering tasks from planning to execution. 

Charlie Guo (DevEx), Ryan Lopop

title: Ecco come Alessandro De Concini usa l'IA nel suo lavoro
description:

Casi pratici, niente chiacchiere teoriche. Mi faranno degli esempi concre

title: OpenClaw: L'AI Gratis che Lavora per Te 24 Ore su 24
description: Non Installare OpenClaw Prima di Aver Visto Questo perché, immagina di avere un dipendente AI che lavora per te 24 ore su 24, 7 giorni su 7. In questo video scopriamo OpenClaw (conosciuto in precedenza come ClawdBot), un assistente AI completamente open source e gratuito creato da Peter Steinberger.

title: Nessuno ne parla, ma ChatGPT NON è nella Top 5 delle Migliori IA
